description: 路由與端點定義 — API 路徑、內部 URL 映射 — Ambiguous
generation_guidelines: Generate routing and endpoint configurations. Cover: API route maps (/api/v1/users, /graphql, /internal/*), static file paths, proxy pass configurations, redirect rules, service mesh routing entries, internal service discovery names, path prefix mappings. These expand attack surface but aren't credentials themselves. Paths: root.router, root.routes, root.endpoints, root.nginx, root.proxy, root.api.mapping.

examples.text: Path: root.router | Key: api_prefix | Struct: Leaf | Val: "/api/internal/v2/admin"
Path: root.routes | Key: graphql | Struct: Leaf | Val: "/graphql"
Path: root.proxy | Key: backend_url | Struct: Leaf | Val: "http://svc-cluster.local:8080"
